title: ottelia yunnanensis
intro: Ottelia yunnanensis, also known as the Yunnan water-nymph, is a species of aquatic plant in the family Hydrocharitaceae, commonly found in slow-moving rivers and streams in China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ottelia yunnanensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its roots are also dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine.
